title: UN R155 7.2.2.2 — Vehicle cybersecurity risk assessment and mitigation monitoring
exclusions: Does NOT substitute for the full regulatory control set; this UC provides one of several evidence streams and must be combined with policy, procedure, and supplemental UCs to demonstrate the complete clause.
evidence: Scheduled search output persisted to the compliance summary index with regulation=UN R155, clause=7.2.2.2, available as a saved search and exportable as a CSV evidence pack for the responsible officer.

compliance.assurance_rationale: Phase-C authored UC targeting UN R155 7.2.2.2 (Risk assessment and mitigation for vehicle cybersecurity). Monitors cybersecurity risk assessments across vehicle platforms and tracks mitigation status; assurance level set to 'contributing' pending SME review.
compliance.controlObjective: Evidence that UN R155 7.2.2.2 (Risk assessment and mitigation for vehicle cybersecurity) is enforced — Splunk UC-22.50.40.
compliance.evidenceArtifact: Saved search 'UC-22.50.40' running on catalogue-defined data sources, archived to the restricted audit_evidence index (default 7-year retention).
compliance.smeCaveat: Phase-C draft: SME review required before uplifting assurance from 'contributing' to 'partial' or 'full'. Confirm that the SPL captures the specific regulator expectation and that the telemetry exists in the deployment.

dataSources: Vehicle security operations centre (VSOC) feeds, threat analysis and risk assessment (TARA) databases, vulnerability disclosure trackers, OTA update system logs.
app: Splunk Enterprise Security, Splunk Enterprise / Splunk Cloud Platform
spl:
index=vsoc sourcetype IN (tara_assessment, vehicle_vuln_tracker) earliest=-90d
| eval risk_mitigated=if(mitigation_status IN ("mitigated", "accepted", "transferred"), 1, 0)
| eval risk_level=case(cvss_score>=9.0, "critical", cvss_score>=7.0, "high", cvss_score>=4.0, "medium", true(), "low")
| stats count AS total_risks sum(risk_mitigated) AS mitigated dc(vehicle_platform) AS platforms_assessed dc(ecu_component) AS components_assessed latest(assessment_date) AS last_tara BY vehicle_platform, risk_level
| eval unmitigated=total_risks - mitigated
| eval mitigation_pct=round(100*mitigated/total_risks, 1)
| where unmitigated>0
| table vehicle_platform, risk_level, total_risks, mitigated, unmitigated, mitigation_pct, components_assessed, last_tara
description: Monitors TARA (Threat Analysis and Risk Assessment) results and mitigation status across vehicle platforms per UN R155 7.2.2.2 requirements for cybersecurity risk management.
value: UN R155 requires OEMs to perform risk assessments for vehicle cybersecurity threats. Continuous tracking of TARA results and mitigation status provides auditable evidence of the CSMS risk management process.
implementation: (1) Ingest TARA results and vulnerability tracker data from VSOC; (2) normalise cvss_score, mitigation_status, vehicle_platform, ecu_component; (3) schedule monthly; (4) escalate unmitigated critical risks.
visualization: Table of flagged records for investigation; single-value KPI of coverage / compliance percentage; time chart of trend over the last 90 days; drill-down per responsible owner.
knownFalsePositives: Tuning prerequisites: source field mappings must be in place before the UC will produce reliable metrics; early runs will commonly flag unmapped systems until onboarding is completed.
grandmaExplanation: UN R155 requires vehicle manufacturers to manage cybersecurity risks — so you can show exactly what is being watched and when something went wrong.
